title: MaceBu
description: A fun, PvP-focused mace combat enhancement inspired by YouTuber Wambuu, featuring custom sounds and target highlighting.
body:
Enhance your Minecraft PvP experience with a simple yet highly satisfying modification designed for fans of the mace! Inspired by the engaging gameplay style of YouTuber **Wambuu**, this mod brings extra flavor and a tactical advantage to your close-quarters combat.

If you want to make every successful hit feel more impactful and visually clear, this is the perfect addition to your modpack.

## ✨ Key Features

*   **Signature "MACE ATTACK" Sound:** Experience the thrill of combat! Every time you wind up for a strike, the mod plays the iconic "MACE ATTACK" voice line, making your battles much more energetic and humorous.
*   **Tactical Purple Outline:** Never miss your target again. When you are perfectly aligned to land a devastating mace blow on an enemy, a distinct **purple outline** will glow around them. This helps you time your critical hits and smash attacks with perfect precision.

## 🎯 Why Download This Mod?

Whether you are fighting friends in a dedicated PvP arena or just trying to survive on a chaotic multiplayer server, timing is everything when using the mace. The visual cue takes the guesswork out of your attack range, while the custom sounds add a layer of satisfaction that standard vanilla combat lacks. 

---

**Ready to smash your enemies?** Download now and bring Wambuu's chaotic mace energy directly into your world!
